description_en: Sapporo may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 1 halal restaurants and 2 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Sapporo, Japan, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Sapporo: 1+ halal restaurants, 2 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3/5.
